title: Insecure Design - Price Manipulation
goal: Purchase premium item for a lower price.
hint: Can users control values sent to server?

whyVulnerable.explanation: The server trusted the price sent by the client instead of validating it.
whyVulnerable.answer: Client-side values must never control business logic.

attackFlow.answer: Attack succeeded because server trusted user input.

secureFix.answer: Critical values must come from server logic.
